title: TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026 for Engineering stream will be released on 12th May 2026, on the official website - eapcet.tgche.ac.in. Check here for the direct link, response sheet download and step by step process to access the TS EAMCET preliminary key online.

content.text: TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026 for the Engineering (E) stream is scheduled to be released today, allowing candidates to download the preliminary key, response sheet and master question paper once the link is activated. As per the official notice, Telangana Council of Higher Education (TGCHE) will enable the answer key download and objection window for the engineering examinations conducted from 9 May to 11 May 2026.

TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026 for Engineering has been scheduled to be made available online on the official website - eapcet.tgche.ac.in. Candidates who appeared for the engineering entrance test will be able to log in using their registration number, hall ticket number and date of birth to access the preliminary key and their individual response sheet.

After downloading the key, students should carefully verify their responses, calculate their probable scores and contact the authorities or use the official objection facility if they notice any discrepancy.

sections.heading: TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: The Telangana Council of Higher Education will release the TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering preliminary answer key, response sheets and master question papers today on the TS EAPCET official portal. Candidates can download these documents within the specified period and use them to estimate their scores before the declaration of TS EAMCET result 2026 for the engineering stream. The answer key will be released online only and can be accessed using valid login credentials on eapcet.tgche.ac.in.

rows: Telangana Council of Higher Education (TGCHE) and JNTU Hyderabad
Preliminary Answer Key with Response Sheet and Master Question Paper
Online on TS EAPCET official portal
From 12th May 2026, 11:00 AM to 14th May 2026, 11:00 AM (as per notice)

sections.heading: TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026 Direct Link

content.text: The TS EAMCET Engineering answer key 2026 download link will be activated today on the TS EAPCET official website for all exam dates and shifts. Once the link is live, candidates can directly access the preliminary key, master question paper and response sheet, and log in with their registration and hall ticket details to view or download them instantly.

rows: TS EAMCET 2026 Official Website - TS EAPCET Portal

links.label: TS EAMCET Engineering Answer Key 2026 - Preliminary Key, Response Sheet and Master Question Paper

sections.heading: How to Check TS EAMCET Answer Key 2026

content.text: Candidates can follow these steps to check and download the TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering answer key once it is released today.

items: Visit the official TS EAPCET website eapcet.tgche.ac.in in your browser.
On the home page, click on the link that says "TS EAMCET 2026 Engineering Preliminary Answer Key / Response Sheet".
You will be redirected to the TG EAPCET answer key login page.
Enter your registration number, TS EAMCET hall ticket number and date of birth in the required fields.
Click on the submit button to view the preliminary answer key, response sheet and master question paper on the screen.
Download the TS EAMCET Engineering answer key PDF and save your response sheet for future reference.
Compare your responses with the official key and calculate your probable score as per the TS EAMCET marking scheme.
If you find any mistakes in the key, use the objection facility on the official website to submit challenges within the given timeline.
